portalLayout.brandDescription: Leads, jobs, estimates, invoices, photos, and follow-up in one command center.
portalLayout.quickAddDescription: Run cash flow, crew, leads, and customer follow-up from one workspace.
portalLayout.onboardingPausedTitle: Welcome - finish setup to activate key automation features.
portalLayout.onboardingPausedDescription: Complete the quick 5-step setup to unlock scheduling, messaging, and reporting.

today.title: Today
today.subtitle: Mobile-first command view for today.
today.activityEmptyTitle: No activity yet - here’s how to get started:
today.activityEmptyBulletThree: View your schedule once a lead converts
today.followUpsSubtitle: Upcoming and overdue follow-ups for this workspace.
today.openJobsSubtitle: Project folders that still need action.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Update SMS and follow-up preferences for {organizationName}.
settings.helperMissedCallToggle: When enabled, missed callers receive a reply text within 60 seconds.
settings.helperWorkerLeadCreate: Allow workers to create organic leads from mobile quick-add.
settings.helperGhostBusting: Safely re-engages stale leads using quiet hours and nudge limits.
settings.helperVoiceNotes: Lets field teams dictate notes that save directly to the job timeline.
settings.helperMetaCapi: Sends paid-invoice conversion events to Meta for ad optimization.
settings.helperOfflineMode: Keeps Today + Jobs readable offline and queues status/note updates.
settings.helperSmsQuietHours: Automated texts send only inside this local time window (default 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM).
settings.missedCallPlaceholderEn: Hey! Sorry we missed your call. Reply here and we can still help.
settings.missedCallPlaceholderEs: Hola, perdona que perdimos tu llamada. Responde aquí y todavía te podemos ayudar.
settings.intakeAskLocationPlaceholderEn: What city are you located in?
settings.intakeAskWorkTypePlaceholderEn: What type of work do you need done?
settings.intakeAskCallbackPlaceholderEn: Pick one of these available callback times:
settings.intakeAskCallbackPlaceholderEs: Elige una de estas horas disponibles para llamada:
settings.intakeCompletionPlaceholderEn: Perfect, you're set for {{time}}. We'll follow up then.
settings.intakeCompletionPlaceholderEs: Perfecto, te agendamos para {{time}}. Te contactamos entonces.
settings.allowWorkerLeadCreate: Allow workers to create organic leads
settings.allowWorkerLeadCreateNote: Only owner/admin/internal users can change worker lead-entry permissions.
settings.ghostTemplateDefault: Hey {{name}}, just checking in. We can still help with your project whenever you're ready. Reply here and we can lock in next steps.
settings.automationFlagsNote: Only owner/admin/internal users can change automation feature flags.

errors.invalidSender: Enter a valid E.164 sender number.
errors.invalidMessageLanguage: Choose a valid automated message language.
errors.invalidMessage: Message must be 1600 characters or less.
errors.invalidReminder: Reminder must be between 15 and 1440 minutes.
errors.invalidReviewUrl: Review link must be a valid URL.
errors.invalidBusinessName: Business name is required and must be 120 characters or less.
errors.invalidCalendarTimezone: Calendar timezone must be a valid IANA timezone.
errors.invalidUserTimezone: Your timezone must be a valid IANA timezone.
errors.invalidSmsQuietHours: SMS quiet hours must use a valid HH:MM time.
errors.invalidGhostHours: Ghost Busting quiet hours must use a valid HH:MM time.
errors.invalidGhostMax: Ghost Busting max nudges must be between 1 and 10.
errors.invalidGhostTemplate: Ghost Busting template must be 1600 characters or less.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.emptyTitle: No events yet in your schedule.
calendar.emptyBody: Add a job or set working hours to populate your calendar.
calendar.unavailableBody: We hit a server issue loading this workspace calendar. Please refresh in a moment.

jobs.title: CRM
jobs.subtitle: Lead folders and supporting customer context for this workspace.
jobs.onboardingEmptyBody: Start by adding a lead or converting a message into a customer folder.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: Create, send, and track manual payments with client-ready PDFs.
invoices.onboardingBody: Finish onboarding, then open a job folder and create your first invoice.
invoices.emptyOpenOnlyBody: Turn off Open only to see paid and closed invoices.
invoices.emptyFilteredBody: Adjust the filters to see invoices that match.
invoices.emptyHiddenBody: Invoices exist in this workspace, but none are visible with the current view.
invoices.emptyCreateBody: Open a job folder and click Create Invoice.
